entry.title: MATLAB-04初阶绘图
entry.content:
使用 plot()函数绘制图线

在MATLAB中，使用 plot() 函数绘制图线，其语法为：

各参数含义如下：

  • x: 图线上点的x坐标
  • y: 图线上点的y坐标
  • Linespec:图线的线条设定,三个指定线型,标记符号和颜色的设定符组成一个字符串,设定符不区分先后.具体细节请参考MATLABDocumentation.
线型设定符线型标记设定符标记颜色设定符颜色
-实线（默认）o圆圈y黄色
--虚线+加号m品红色
:点线*星号c青蓝色
-.点划线.点r红色
x叉号g绿色
s方形b蓝色
d菱形w白色
^上三角k黑色
v下三角
>右三角
<左三角
p五角形
h六角形

hold on/off

Use hold on to have both plots in one figure

MATLAB在绘制图形时，会清除窗口内之前的图形，使用该指令可以保持图窗

entry.title: MATLAB-03变量和档案存取
entry.content:
MATLAB Variables and Dataaccess

[[MATLAB3~MATLAB variable.png]]

数值类型描述
double双精度浮点数
single单精度浮点数
int88位带符号整数
int1616位带符号整数
int3232位带符号整数
int6464位带符号整数
uint88位无符号整数
uint1616位无符号整数
uint3232位无符号整数
uint6464位无符号整数

Variables

Character(char)

  • A character is represented in ASCII using a numeric code between 0to 255
  • Create a character or a string by putting them into a pair ofapostrophe
  • Use uint16() to convert a char to its ASCII code

String

  • An array collects characters:
    • s1 = 'Example';
    • s2 = 'String'
  • String concatenation:
    • s3 = [s1 s2];
    • s4 = [s1; s2];
      • Error: Dimension of matries being concatenated are notconsistent
      • s5 = [s1; s1]
        • It works well

Logic Operations andAssignments

Structure

  • A method of storing heterogeneous data
  • Structures contain arrays called fields
  • Students assignment grades:
函数名函数作用
struct创建结构体
struct2cell将结构体转换为元胞数组
cell2struct将元胞数组转换为结构体
isstruct判断某变量是否是结构体
structfun对结构体的每个字段都应用某函数
fieldnames获取结构体的所有字段名
isfield判断结构体是否包含某字段
getfield获取结构体某字段的值
setfield为结构体中的某字段赋值
rmfield删除结构体中的某字段
orderfields为结构体字段排序

[!example]

rmfield(student,'id')

Nesting Structure

Cell Array

  • Another method of storing heterogeneous data
  • Similar to matrix but each entry contains different type ofdata
  • Declared using { }
  • The two following expressions are the same
    • A{m, n} = element;
    • A(m ,n) ={element};
  • Each entry in a cell array hold s a pointer to a data structure
  • Different cells of the same cell array can point to different typesof data structures

Access Cell Array

  • 有两种方式访问元胞数组中的数据,分别是:单元索引()，和数组索引{}
    • 使用单元索引(),我们得到的是一个子元胞数组.
    • 使用内容索引{},我们得到的是元胞数组对应区域中的内容.

matrix2cell and num2cell

use help or doc

Multidimensional Array

[[MATLAB3~multidimensional array.png]]

cat()

使用cat函数可以在指定维度上对元胞数组进行拼接(concatenation)

[[MATLAB3~cat.png]]

reshape()

Create a matrix B from the matrix A below using reshape():

\[A = \left(\begin{array}{ccc} 1 & 2 & 3\\ 4 & 5 & 6\end{array}\right) \Rightarrow B = \left(\begin{array}{cc} 1 & 5\\ 4& 3\\ 2 & 6 \end{array}\right)\]

File Access

MAT format

MATLAB工作区里的数据可以以 .mat 格式保存在文件中，使用save 函数将数据存入文件，使用 load函数从文件中读取数据

  • save 函数的语法如下：
    • save(filename， variables) 将变量variables 以二进制形式存入文件中
    • save(filename, variables, '-ascii')将变量以文本形式存入文件中
  • load 函数的语法如下：
    • load(filename)从二进制形式文件中读取数据.
    • load(filename,'-ascii')从文本形式文件中读取数据.

其中参数filename和variables都是字符串格式,若不指定variables参数,则将当前工作区内所有变量存入文件中.

复杂的数据格式,如struct和cell,不支持以二进制格式存储.

Excel File

  • 读取Excel文件：[num,txt,raw] = xlsread(filename,sheet,xlRange)
    • 自动去掉文字部分
  • 写入Excel的语法:xlswrite(filename,A,sheet,xlRange)
  • 同时读取文本和数字可以使用以下操作：[Score Header] = xlsread('score.xlsx')

Low-level File I/O Functions

同C语言的文件I/O

使用 type filename 可以打印出文本的内容

entry.title: MATLAB-02结构化程式和自定义函数
entry.content:
MATLAB Script

  • A file containing a series of MATLAB commands
  • Pretty much like a C/C++ program
    • However Script does not need to be compiled before run
  • Scripts need to be saved to as <file>.m filebefore they can be run

%% is the symbol of section, we can run a singlesection

use start indent to make code more readable

Script Flow

  • Typically scripts run from the first line to the last
  • Structured programming techniques(subroutine, loop. condition, etc.)are applied to make the program looks neat

Flow Control

[[MATLAB2~flow control.png]]

Rational Operators

[[MATLAB2~relational operator.png]]

if elseif else

switch

while

for

Pre-allocating Space toVaribles

Method A:

Method B:

Method B is faster, because method B used Pre-allocating.

The explanation of MATLAB:

The size of the indicated variable or array appears to be changingwith each loop iteration.Commonly, this message appears because an arrayis growing by assignment or concatenation.Growing an array by assignmentor concatenation can be expensive.For large arrays,MATLAB must allocatea new block of memory and copy the older array contents to the new arrayas it makes each assignment.

Programs that change the size of a variable in this way can spendmost of their run time in this inefficient activity.There is alsosignificant overhead in shrinking an array on each iteration or inchanging the size of a variable on each iteration. In such cases,MATLABmust reallocate and copy the contents repeatedly.

break

Used in iteration where convergence is not guaranteed.

Tips for Script Writing

  • At the beginning of your script, use command
    • clear all to remove previous variables
    • close all to close all figures
  • Use semicolon ; at the end of commands to inhibitunwanted output
  • Use ellipsis ... to make scripts more readable
    • MATLAB2020 and later version can break line with no need to useellipsis
  • Press Ctrl+C to terminate the script before
  • conclusion

Content of MATLAB Built-inFunction

In this example, function is a keyword, y is the name of outputvariable, mean is the name of function

Use Define Functions

Use the operator .* to support input vector.

For example, freebody([0 1], [0 1], [10 20]) will output[490 1981]

Function withMultiple Inputs and Outputs

  • The acceleration of a particle and the force acting on it are asfollows:

\[\begin{aligned}a &= \frac{v_2 - v_1}{t_2 - t_1}\\F &= ma\end{aligned}\]

[!note] output single variable as array X = acc(10, 5, 2, 1, 10); %X= 5 [X Y] = acc(10, 5, 2, 1, 10); %X = 5, Y = 50

If we use the following form, the output will be a array.

The use of disp

disp() 仅接受一个参数，下面的这种写法是错误的：

disp('aaa',32)

disp(['aaa',78])会输出'aaaN'，因为disp将78当做一个ASCII码字符作为显示

若想实现字符串和数字的混合输出，可以使用如下形式

disp(['aaa',num2str(32)])，输出aaa32。

num2str()函数将数字转换为字符类型数组，再通过矩阵的拼接，将两个字符类型数组拼接位一个数组，从而正常显示输出

[!warning] 以下表达也可显示，但是显示形式不便于阅读

disp({'aaa',32})：使用元胞数组，显示的内容为{'aaa'} {[32]}

Function Default Variables

函数参数意义

imputname 输入变量名列表

mfilename 函数源代码文件名

nargin 输入变量数

nargout 输出变量个数

varargin 可变长输入参数列表

varargout 可变长输出参数列表

VariablesMeaning
inputnameVariable name of function input
mfilenameFile name of currently runningfunction
narginNumber of function input arguments
vararginVariable length of argrument list
varargoutVarible length output argument list

Function Handle

A way to create anonymous functions, i.e., one line expressionfunctions that do not have not have to be defined in .m files

entry.title: MATLAB-01基本操作和矩阵输入
entry.content:
不声明时默认的类型时double

Special Variables andConstants

  • ans

  • i, j : complex number

  • Inf : ∞

  • eps : epsilon, 2.2204e-16

  • NaN : not a number

  • pi : π

  • To list Keywords:

    • >> iskeyword

Array(Vector and Matrix)

Output:

\[a*b=30\]

\[b*a =\left(\begin{array}{cccc}1 & 2 & 3 & 4\\2 & 4 & 6 & 8\\3 & 6 & 9 & 12\\4 & 8 & 12 & 16\end{array}\right)\]

用空格(space)隔开行元素，用分号(semicolon)隔开不同的列元素

Array Indexing

  1. A(n): 取出矩阵的第n个元素（MATLAB采用列优先）
  2. A(row, column): 取出矩阵第row行第column列的元素
  3. A(Matrix or Vector):使用矩阵或者向量的值索引，返回一个按原方式排列的矩阵或向量
  4. A(row vector, column vector):使用第一个向量作为行数，第二个向量作为列数，取二者交叉元素

Colon Operator

create a array: start: step: stop, different from pyton:range(start, stop, step)

使用冒号运算符清空矩阵中的某一行或者某一列：

A(3,:) = []: 清空第三行，这里的[ ]表示empty

Array Concatenation

Output:

\[A = \left(\begin{array}{cc} 1 & 2\\ 3 & 4 \end{array}\right)\\B = \left(\begin{array}{cc} 9 & 9\\ 9 & 9 \end{array}\right)\\C = \left(\begin{array}{cccc} 1 & 2 & 9 & 9\\ 3 & 4& 9 & 9 \end{array}\right)\\D = \left(\begin{array}{cc} 1 & 2\\ 3 & 4\\ 9 & 9\\ 9 &9 \end{array}\right)\]

Array Manipulation

Operators on array: + - */ ^ . '

注意：当a为数值时，A.*a和A*a相同，A.\a和A\a相同，但是A^a和A.^a不同

Some Special Matrix

  • linspace(): linearly spaced vectors
    • linspace(start, stop, number)
  • eys(): n*n identity matrix
  • zeros(n1, n2): n1*n2 zero matrix
  • ones(n1, n2): n1*n2 matrix with every entry as 1
  • diag(): diagonal matrix
  • rand(): uniformly distributed random numbers

Some Matrix Function

column width function

For example:

$$\[\begin{aligned}M = \left(\begin{array}{cccc} 16 & 2 & 3 & 13\\ 5 & 11& 10 & 8\\ 9 & 7 & 6 & 12\\ 4 & 14 & 15& 1 \end{array}\right)\\\\\max(M) = \left(\begin{array}{cccc}16 & 14 & 15 &13\end{array} \right)\\\\\max(\max(M)) = 16\\\\\mathrm{sum}(M)=\left(\begin{array}{cccc} 34 & 34 & 34 & 34\end{array}\right)\\\\\mathrm{sum}(\mathrm{sum}) = 136\end{aligned}\]

$$

The difference between sort andsortrows:

sort函数会将每一个row的内部进行排序后输出，而sortrows函数则只会比较第一个row，它将每一个column视为整体进行排序：

For example:

$$\[\begin{aligned}M = \left(\begin{array}{cccc} 16 & 2 & 3 & 13\\ 5 & 11& 10 & 8\\ 9 & 7 & 6 & 12\\ 4 & 14 & 15& 1 \end{array}\right)\\\\\mathrm{sort}(M) = \left(\begin{array}{cccc} 4 & 2 & 3 & 1\\5 & 7 & 6 & 8\\ 9 & 11 & 10 & 12\\ 16 & 14& 15 & 13 \end{array}\right)\\\\\mathrm{sortrows}(M) = \left(\begin{array}{cccc} 4 & 14 & 15& 1\\ 5 & 11 & 10 & 8\\ 9 & 7 & 6 & 12\\ 16& 2 & 3 & 13 \end{array}\right)\end{aligned}\]

$$

Words

  1. even number: 偶数
  2. odd number:奇数
  3. increment
  4. concat: 合并
  5. concatenate: 连接，联系的
  6. semicolon: 分号

  7. Broken Key Points

\[e^{x}= 1+ \frac{x}{1!}+ \frac{x^{2}}{2!}+ \frac{x^{3}}{3!}+...\] $$\[\begin{aligned}\end{aligned}\]

$$

  1. use latex(variable) to convert matlab expression toLaTeX expression.
  2. rem(a,b) will return the remainder of a/b.
  3. prod(array) will return the product of elements in thearray
  4. clear will delete all varibles in workspace, andclear varible name will only delete specific varible inworkspace
  5. use tic to start the timer, and use toc tostop the timer. tic and toc appear in pairs tocalculate the time the program runs.

entry.title: Hello World
entry.content:
Welcome to Hexo! This is your veryfirst post. Check documentation formore info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find theanswer in troubleshooting oryou can ask me on GitHub.

Quick Start

Create a new post

More info: Writing

Run server

More info: Server

Generate static files

More info: Generating

Deploy to remote sites

More info: Deployment
